mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, session_id, content, summary, role, dim, importance, tags, access_count, last_access_at, expires_at, created_at, updated_at FROM memory_long_term WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, user_id, session_id, content, summary, role, embedding, dim, importance, tags, access_count, last_access_at, expires_at, created_at, updated_at FROM memory_long_term WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE memory_long_term SET access_count = access_count + 1, last_access_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
